steps.title: Locate the 2018 exhibition
steps.content: The goal asks for the 2018 exhibition: Pacha, Llaqta, Wasichay: Indigenous Space, Modern Architecture, New Art, featuring seven emerging Latino artists.

steps.title: Match the exhibition
steps.content:
B correctly identifies the 2018 exhibition by name and includes the detail about seven emerging Latino artists.

Choices A, C, and D either name the wrong exhibition, fail to specify which is 2018, or vaguely contrast them without clarifying the years.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
